intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Well, sort of. I was out looking for lights when I heard something in the woods.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Woods. That's not sky. Go on.

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: I know, I said UFOs to get through. But what I saw was... it was walking.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Walking. What was it?

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Bipedal. Maybe seven feet. Covered in matted dark fur. It looked right at me, Vern.

Skeptical.speaker: Vern
Skeptical.text: Could've been a bear. They stand up sometimes.

Skeptical.speaker: Caller
Skeptical.text: Bears don't have shoulders like that. Or eyes that reflect green.

Believing.speaker: Vern
Believing.text: Green eye shine. Classic sasquatch marker.

Believing.speaker: Caller
Believing.text: That's what I thought. I've been reading up since it happened.

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: Appreciate you coming clean. Keep watching those woods.

conclusion.speaker: Caller
conclusion.text: Thanks, Vern. Sorry about the UFO thing.

intro.speaker: Vern
intro.text: {callerName}, {callerLocation}. You said UFOs but I'm guessing that's not what this is about.

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: You caught me. I said that to get through, but it's actually about something I saw in the woods.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Great. So you lied. What did you actually see?

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: I'm sorry. It was bipedal, Vern. Seven feet tall, covered in fur.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Bigfoot. You're calling about Bigfoot.

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: I know how it sounds. But it looked right at me. Green eyes.

Skeptical.speaker: Vern
Skeptical.text: Probably a guy in a suit. Lot of hoaxers out there.

Skeptical.speaker: Caller
Skeptical.text: At 3 AM in the middle of nowhere? Who would do that?

Believing.speaker: Vern
Believing.text: Green eye shine. At least you've got details. More than most.

Believing.speaker: Caller
Believing.text: I wrote everything down right after. I knew people wouldn't believe me.

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: Don't lie to get through next time. But thanks for the call.

intro.speaker: Vern
intro.text: {callerName} from {callerLocation}, you're on the air. Said you had a UFO sighting?

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: I have to be honest, Vern. I said UFOs to get through, but that's not what I saw.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Alright. What did you actually see?

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: I was out in the woods, looking for lights in the sky. But what I found was on the ground.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: On the ground. What are we talking about here?

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Bipedal. Seven feet at least. Covered in dark, matted fur. It turned and looked right at me.

Skeptical.speaker: Vern
Skeptical.text: Could've been a bear standing up. They do that.

Skeptical.speaker: Caller
Skeptical.text: Vern, I've seen bears. This had shoulders. And eyes that reflected green in my flashlight.

Believing.speaker: Vern
Believing.text: Green eye shine. That's a detail the hoaxers always miss.

Believing.speaker: Caller
Believing.text: I didn't know that until I started researching after. It matches the reports.

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: Appreciate you coming clean about the topic. Send in a report if you can.

conclusion.speaker: Caller
conclusion.text: Will do. Thanks for hearing me out, Vern.

intro.speaker: Vern
intro.text: {callerName} from {callerLocation}, you're on. UFO sighting, you said?

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: I have to level with you, Vern. I said UFOs to get past screening. What I actually saw...

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Oh, now you've got my attention. What was it really?

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: I was out in the woods hoping to catch lights in the sky. Instead, I heard something moving through the brush.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Moving through the brush. And you saw it?

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Bipedal. At least seven feet. Dark matted fur. And Vern, it turned and looked right at me with these green reflecting eyes.

Skeptical.speaker: Vern
Skeptical.text: Now hold on. Green reflecting eyes could be a lot of animals.

Skeptical.speaker: Caller
Skeptical.text: Standing seven feet tall on two legs? With shoulders wider than a doorframe?

Believing.speaker: Vern
Believing.text: Green eye shine. Bipedal. You know what this sounds like.

Believing.speaker: Caller
Believing.text: I didn't want to say it. But yeah. I think I saw a sasquatch.

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: Look, I get why you faked the topic. But this is the real deal. Document everything.

conclusion.speaker: Caller
conclusion.text: Already on it. Thank you, Vern.

intro.speaker: Vern
intro.text: We've got {callerName} on the line from {callerLocation}! UFO sighting tonight?!

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Vern, I gotta come clean - I said UFOs but that's NOT what I saw!

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Oh! OH! What was it?! Tell me!

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: I was in the woods looking for lights, but something came CRASHING through the trees!

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: CRASHING! You saw it?!

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: SEVEN FEET TALL, Vern! Covered in fur! It LOOKED at me! Green eyes!

Skeptical.speaker: Vern
Skeptical.text: Wait wait - green eyes? You sure it wasn't just a big bear?

Skeptical.speaker: Caller
Skeptical.text: Bears don't have SHOULDERS like that! And they don't STARE at you!

Believing.speaker: Vern
Believing.text: GREEN EYE SHINE! That's the TELL, folks! That's the sasquatch marker!

Believing.speaker: Caller
Believing.text: I KNEW you'd get it! Nobody else believes me!

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: Document EVERYTHING! This is HUGE! Get back to me!

conclusion.speaker: Caller
conclusion.text: I will! Thank you, Vern! THANK YOU!
